title: Items Duplicated on Dashboard
excerpt:
I’ve created a Dashboard, and am using the “My Week” to show teammate’s tasks. 
I’ve selected which boards I want to show, but some of the items are showing up twice and I can’t tell why.

posts.author: ericac (Erica)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve created a Dashboard, and am using the “My Week” to show teammate’s tasks.

I’ve selected which boards I want to show, but some of the items are showing up twice and I can’t tell why.
